features_title: The Art of Finance and Integrity
features_subtitle: We are not just a bank — we ensure ethical standards and transparency in every transaction
feature_1_desc: Complete absence of usury (riba) and questionable assets. All operations are supervised by the Shariah Board.
feature_2_desc: Remote VIP service, built-in Zakat calculator, and Shariah-compliant investment management via Hayot App.
feature_3_desc: Premium cashback for ethical purchases. Cashback is restricted for haram products (alcohol, gambling).
feature_4_desc: Your capital is directed solely into halal business projects that generate real economic benefits.
rates_subtitle: Official exchange rates in global markets and quick converter
testi_subtitle: Opinions of large investors managing their wealth ethically through Hayot Bank
testi_1_text: "We purchased our new office building under Shariah-compliant Murabaha terms. No interest or hidden overpayments. Outstanding execution!"

faq_subtitle: Answers to key questions about Islamic finance principles and our operations
faq_1_q: How does Islamic banking generate profit without charging interest?
faq_1_a: We do not charge or pay interest. We operate on a partnership basis. By investing clients' capital (Mudarabah) in halal trade and production, we share the actual commercial profit in a pre-agreed ratio.
faq_2_q: How does Murabaha trade agreement differ from a standard loan?
faq_2_a: A loan is renting money for interest. In Murabaha, the bank purchases the asset you request (car, property), adds its fixed markup, and sells it to you in installments. This is halal trade with a fixed final price.
faq_3_q: Are there any risks of capital loss in the Mudarabah fund?
faq_3_a: Yes, under Shariah rules, profit yield cannot be guaranteed, as guaranteed return equals interest (riba). In partnership, the investor bears financial risks, while the bank risks its labor. We choose low-risk projects.
faq_4_q: How do I order a Prestige card and what are the delivery terms?
faq_4_a: Apply in the Hayot App. Your card in a premium gift box will be delivered free within 24 hours in Tashkent and 2 business days in other regions.
footer_about: Hayot Bank — premium digital Islamic bank supervised by the Shariah Advisory Board. Licensed by CBU No. 254.
footer_subscribe_desc: Stay updated on Islamic finance news and exclusive private wealth investment reports
sharia_desc: All banking contracts, financial products, and investments are audited and approved by our independent Shariah Advisory Board composed of prominent Islamic scholars from Uzbekistan and worldwide.
fin_subtitle: Apply for Shariah-compliant halal financing in just 5 minutes without leaving your home
fin_step1_desc: Choose your required amount and payment term using the interactive sliders.
fin_step2_desc: Go through a fast and secure identity check using your passport/ID and Face ID.
fin_step3_desc: Our AI-powered scoring system will evaluate and decide on your request within 5 minutes.
fin_step4_desc: The Murabaha contract is signed online, and funds are instantly credited to your card.
